summary: Frontend testing of 3 feature areas: Navbar fixes, Compliance Library cross-sell link, System Architecture Diagram v2. All major features working correctly. Minor issue: navbar font size is 18.375px instead of expected ~14px.

ui_bugs.issue: Nav link font-size is 18.375px (computed), expected ~14px per spec. The CSS may be using rem and the base font is larger than expected.

action_items: Review navbar font-size: computed value is 18.375px, spec says ~14px. Adjust if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar font-size: 18.375px computed vs expected ~14px. If FRAMEWORK_LINKS font-size was reduced, check that CSS specificity or rem base isn't overriding it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 feature sets tested. Navbar: Product Library link visible, REACH CHECK gold button only, no duplicate REACH Diagnostic. Compliance Library: cross-sell link 'Or view all 16 failure patterns →' appears on NO recommendation cards (tested with audit-no-dq_file). System Architecture Diagram: heading, all 4 threat vectors (OVER/AROUND/THROUGH/UNDER), all 4 pillars, MC Authority/PROTECTED, all 4 guards visible; hover on OVER shows callout. Only concern: navbar link font-size ~18.375px vs ~14px spec.

test_results.navbar_product_library_link: PASS - visible in navbar, links to /compliance-library
test_results.navbar_dark_page_visibility: PASS - clearly visible on /compliance-library with white text
test_results.navbar_no_duplicate_reach: PASS - only REACH CHECK gold button, no duplicate REACH Diagnostic link
test_results.compliance_library_crosssell: PASS - 'Or view all 16 failure patterns →' link visible on NO recommendation cards
test_results.arch_diagram_threat_vectors: PASS - OVER, AROUND, THROUGH, UNDER all visible as side panels
test_results.arch_diagram_pillars: PASS - Authority Protection, Insurance Continuity, Compliance Backbone, Cash-Flow Oxygen all visible
test_results.arch_diagram_mc_authority: PASS - 'MC Authority' + 'PROTECTED' visible (split across two lines in DOM)
test_results.arch_diagram_hover: PASS - hovering OVER shows 'Regulatory Enforcement' callout
test_results.arch_diagram_guards: PASS - Driver Guard, Drug Guard, Hours Guard, Equipment Guard all visible
